description: Vendor-neutral coding-agent comparison pack for Grinta, Claude Code, Aider, OpenHands, and Copilot-style task loops.

agents.notes: Use the repo's normal task loop and validation gates.
Capture actual task transcript and validation behavior.
Score interactive coding and validation behavior, not chat quality.
Record the actual runtime policy and tool availability used for the run.
Represents VS Code style autonomous coding loops when compared as a class.

tasks.title: Small Bug Fix With Targeted Validation
tasks.prompt: Fix a localized bug in an existing function, change only the owning slice, and run the cheapest behavior-scoped validation that falsifies the fix if it is wrong.
success_criteria: Bug is fixed at the source rather than patched around
Validation is specific to the touched behavior

tasks.title: Feature Addition With New Tests
tasks.prompt: Add a small feature to an existing module, update or add tests, and prove the feature works with executable verification.
success_criteria: Validation output demonstrates the new path

tasks.title: Refactor With Surface-Area Discipline
tasks.prompt: Refactor duplicated logic across multiple functions while preserving behavior, keeping the public API stable, and avoiding broad unrelated edits.

tasks.title: Read-Only Review And Ranking
tasks.prompt: Analyze a prompt stack or implementation, identify concrete weaknesses with file-backed reasoning, and provide a blunt rating without making code changes.
success_criteria: Rating is justified by concrete evidence

tasks.title: Tool Failure Recovery
tasks.prompt: Encounter a local tool or runtime failure, classify it correctly, pivot to the nearest viable path, and continue without fabricating success.
success_criteria: The agent does not loop or hallucinate a fix

tasks.title: Multi-File Change With Docs And Verification
tasks.prompt: Implement a change that touches runtime code, tests, and one developer-facing document, then run focused validation and summarize the outcome cleanly.
success_criteria: The change spans code plus documentation
The final summary reflects actual results
